description: Use this API to return an array of real values for subsystem branches. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr, rarray = aflowreal(sid, owner, ties, flag, string)
python_syntax: ierr, rarray = aflowreal(sid, owner, ties, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: A flag indicating owner usage if ownership is a subsystem selection criterion (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem branches to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem branches to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the branch quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: rarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for each end of interior subsystem branches only.
for the subsystem bus end of tie branches only.
for the non-subsystem bus end of tie branches only.
for each end of tie branches only.
for each end of interior subsystem branches and the subsystem bus end of tie branches.
for each end of interior subsystem branches and tie branches.

string.description: Branch current, in amps (0.0 if bus base voltage is 0.0).
Branch current, in pu.
Percent from bus current of default rating set.
Percent from bus current of rating set A.
Percent from bus current of rating set B.
Percent from bus current of rating set C.
Percent from bus MVA of default rating set.
Percent from bus MVA of rating set A.
Percent from bus MVA of rating set B.
Percent from bus MVA of rating set C.
Percent from bus current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of default rating set.
Percent from bus current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of rating set A.
Percent from bus current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of rating set B.
Percent from bus current or MVA loading (according to the appropriate percent loading units program option setting) of rating set C.
First owner fraction.
Second owner fraction.
Third owner fraction.
Fourth owner fraction.
Rating from default rating set.
Rating from rating set A.
Rating from rating set B.
Rating from rating set C.
Active power flow, in MW.
Reactive power flow, in Mvar.
abs(P+jQ), in MVA.
Active power losses, in MW.
Reactive power losses, in Mvar.
Active power flow (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power flow (units determined by power output options).
abs(P+jQ) (units determined by power output options).
Active power losses (units determined by power output options).
Reactive power losses (units determined by power output options).

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of RARRAY, is not large enough.
